issue_title: Change way of handle lazy load images
issue_body_preview:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
Properly handle lazy load in [code](https://github.com/navendu-pottekkat/nsfw-filter/blob/master/src/content.js#L35)

## Expected Behavior
<!--- If you're describing a bug, tell us what should happen -->
<!--- If you're suggest
test_description_zh: 在包含懒加载图片（lazy load）的网页上启用 NSFW 过滤扩展，滚动页面使懒加载图片逐步加载，观察扩展是否能正确检测并过滤这些懒加载的图片。
expected_result_zh: 当页面中的懒加载图片逐步加载显示时，NSFW 过滤扩展应能正确识别并处理这些图片，对不适当内容的图片进行过滤/遮挡，不会出现遗漏未处理的情况。
